entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L. subsp. hypogaea var. hypogaea

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: The characteristic of producing a high amount of crop

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist diseases

entities.name: INSECT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist insect pests

entities.name: RUST
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting peanut plants

entities.name: PUCCINIA ARACHIDIS
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes rust in peanuts

entities.name: LATE LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting peanut leaves

entities.name: PHAEOISARIOPSIS PERSONATA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes late leaf spot in peanuts

entities.name: BACTERIAL WILT
entities.description: A bacterial disease causing wilting in peanut plants

entities.name: PSEUDOMONAS SOLANACEARUM
entities.description: The bacterial pathogen that causes bacterial wilt

entities.name: LEAF MINER
entities.description: An insect pest, Aproarema modicella, that damages peanut leaves

entities.name: TOBACCO CATERPILLAR
entities.description: An insect pest, Spodoptera litura, that damages peanut plants

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics
